ksa_text: Manage operational budgets and financial resources for data and AI programs, including cost forecasting, expenditure tracking, variance analysis, financial reporting, and cost optimization recommendations.

dcwf.top_element_label: Perform configuration management, problem management, capacity management, and financial management for databases and data management systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Strategies to maximize AI benefits and minimize negative impacts are planned, prepared, implemented, documented, and informed by input from relevant AI actors.

top_anchors.element_label: Strategies to maximize AI benefits and minimize negative impacts are planned, prepared, implemented, documented, and informed by input from relevant AI actors.
Perform configuration management, problem management, capacity management, and financial management for databases and data management systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-T-009 (OP, Task) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4226 is insufficient to establish relevance to senior-level analytics and business intelligence at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nist_ai_rmf=0.423, ddat=0.417, dcwf=0.407) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: OP domain KSA OP-T-009 excluded at composite 0.4226, but KSA text contains direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency: the presence of analytics terminology in a moderate fit KSA at score 0.4226 suggests the threshold is excluding genuinely relevant content.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.4226 with confirmed analytics-domain terminology for a OP (moderate fit) KSA indicates real role relevance for Senior Data Analyst. The 0.43 threshold is a calibration heuristic; text-signal confirmation overrides marginal score shortfall at this level.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude overturned. OP KSA with composite 0.4226 and confirmed analytics-domain text signals included on internal consistency grounds.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA OP-T-009 (OP, composite 0.4226) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with DDAT Senior Data Analyst and Lead Analyst profiles; operational workflow competencies documented in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles. Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.4226 with signal across nist_ai_rmf=0.423, ddat=0.417, dcwf=0.407 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from OP-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Senior Data Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: include. Composite 0.4226, domain OP. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
